_comment: A DATED snapshot of the Live-tier benchmark numbers, captured against real models via OpenRouter and the real competitor libraries. Not reproducible offline (Track 1/2 need a model key). It is the traceable source for the README's Live figures and the generated assets (benchmarks/render_assets.py reads it). Regenerate with the commands in each section's `reproduce` field.

track2_uplift.setup: 15 company-specific policy questions a model cannot know from pretraining; 4 models x 2 runs; grounded-answer accuracy, direct vs through Vincio; every routed answer cited

track1_model.reproduce: python benchmarks/eval_live.py --provider openrouter --model <id> --benchmarks reasoning.gsm8k knowledge.mmlu --tier live --dataset-dir <real GSM8K/MMLU slices>
track1_model.setup: real official GSM8K (n=20) and MMLU (n=15) slices via Hugging Face; small-slice demonstration, reported not gated

track3_feature_headline.setup: Vincio features vs the real competitor library, measured live on this machine (deterministic quality metric; latency is machine-relative and rounded)

plates.sub: current fact vs a naive keyword store
